programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: The case takes a darker turn when Pat is visited by Nathan, an old friend with an equally murky history — and then Nathan turns up dead, leaving Pat as the prime suspect.

programme.title: Fire Country S1
programme.desc: The station 42 crew responds to an out-of-control blaze at a wellness retreat, and the third rock crew tries to protect one of their own from a dangerous overdose.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent – Series 18
programme.desc: Britain's Got Talent 2025, the 18th series, will feature Ant and Dec returning as hosts and Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon, and Bruno Tonioli as judges. The series will include a variety of acts vying for the chance to perform at the Royal Variety Performance and win a 250,000 prize.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral S8
programme.desc: From whirling tornadoes to torrential rains, to harrowing hurricanes, Weather Gone Viral gives viewers unprecedented access to some of the most insane meteorological moments from around the world. Featuring videos of the most extreme and destructive weather conditions, firsthand accounts, and professional meteorologists sharing tales from the front lines, viewers get to experience the fury of Mother Nature.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Lion Mums S4
programme.desc: Margaret is left devastated after her big date doesn't go the way she planned. Min Yi takes a huge risk after a big job announcement to her family backfires. Nabilah finds herself in over her head as she tries to help a friend at school, while Hillary's stress eating intensifies. Meanwhile, Grace anxiously awaits the results of Kyra's DNA test.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Bakugan 3.1
programme.desc: The Bakugan brawlers are back with new Bakugan buddies! Watch out for an all new origin story.

programme.title: Super BOOMi S2
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) Super BOOMi follows an animated bear and his friends as they learn and play in a virtual reality game universe.

programme.title: Blippi Visits
programme.desc: Come explore the world with Blippi! There are so many exciting things to explore and learn. Feed your kids' curiosity while they learn about vehicles, animals, the natural world and so much more.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: After Imp steals the Mega Battery, Ollipolis' power source, Ollie and his friends work together to reclaim the battery and restore power to Ollipolis. Alien 1 refuses to queue up. He demonstrates the power of his box. The Imp sees it and steals the box. The Triangle Aliens learns the Importance of queuing up.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Sesame Street S55
programme.desc: The season's main curricular goals are mindfulness and expressing one's feelings.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr2
programme.desc: The series has lots more of the comedy, teamwork, great gadgets (including a brand new vehicle), awesome sights and funky facts about amazing landmarks that young viewers and their parents have come to love. Travelling the world with their teacher, mentor and friend Ubercorn, a disco-grooving unicorn, the Go Jetters are fixing the mishaps caused by the mischievous meddlings of Grandmaster Glitch in new locations including Central Park in New York, Machu Picchu, China, Japan, Mali, and Petra.

programme.title: Super Rover & Friends
programme.desc: Jax doesn't want to go to school because he believes he can learn everything from the library. Meanwhile, Vicky doesn't want to go to school because she doesn't want to leave her favorite things alone behind. How will Rover and Jinxy help them see that a school is also a fun learning environment too?

programme.title: Lupin's Tales S1
programme.desc: Lupin dreams of being like the storybook heroes he admires, and goes from one tale to the next to live out their adventures. But the impetuous wolf-cub is far from perfect, and it's not easy getting to that "happy ending"! Luckily, he can count on the Narrator's help to learn from his mistakes.

programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: Busy Bodies
programme.desc: Yawn! Aidan is struggling to stay awake in the daytime, and is falling asleep everywhere! Med and Evie must get to the bottom of this and uncover why sleep is important for all of us. Why do we dream and what really happens in our brain when we are asleep? What is the sleepy secret that Aidan's hiding?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!!

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: A funny and frightening rollercoaster journey investigating our planet's most extreme weather as told and filmed by ordinary people caught in the eye of the storm'. We follow the incredible human stories of the families caught up in snowstorms, avalanches, floods, landslides, terrifying wildfires and too close for comfort lightning strikes. The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.desc: Whale with Steve Backshall gives a stunning and comprehensive overview of the world of whales, dolphins and porpoises. Adventurer and conservationist Steve Backshall travels from the Azores to the Arctic, capturing breathtaking underwater footage in each unique habitat.

programme.title: 敦煌千年不散的宴席
programme.desc: 中华民族之所以五千年生生不息绵延不绝就是因为我们的语言文字风俗饮食都是千年传承从来没有中断观众发现以往秦川安秋导演创作的敦煌纪录片都承载了非常厚重的历史文化信息这次的美食片却大不一样从主题定位人物故事叙事方式等都有了非常大的改变叙述风格也生动活泼了很多让观众看到了更多的人间烟火一种田园诗般的美该片通过将敦煌壁画饮食文化呈现出来并将当下敦煌百姓的生活状态一日三餐加工食物的过程忠实记录下来以展现敦煌饮食文化的传承与发展.

programme.title: Kaimatru Man vs Life
programme.desc: Kaimatru- Man vs Life is a reality show envisioned to help us see life from the eyes of those with less privilege than us, be it monetary, social, cultural, or often all three combined. With this show, we endeavour to touch a chord with the viewer and thus, help them hear the song of life that is melodiously playing in their lives. The show features 13 local celebrities and makes them exchange their life with someone less fortunate across India.

programme.desc: Brothers Palani and Vetri live in a village where Palani is a farmer. Vetri, a driver, goes to Chennai for a better job and, unfortunately, gets into an altercation with underworld gangster Essakki.

programme.title: Ticket Pottaachu
programme.desc: Pestle and Mortar dives into the immersive experience of preparing staples in the most authentic means possible, a culinary experience like never before. It is a cooking shows that brings the audience onto roads less travelled. Each week brings the audience to exotic destinations with their own culture, stories, festivals and needless to say, epicurean ensemble. Back to basics-No more gas stoves and buying fish from the markets, pick up your firewood and start the fire!

programme.title: Abhiyum Naanum
programme.desc: "Abiyum Naanum" is a heartwarming family drama that follows 12-year-old Abimanyu, a boy genius on the autism spectrum, as he navigates the challenges of adolescence, school, and family life with a perspective that transforms the mundane into the magical.

programme.title: Seithi
programme.desc: (Live) Tamil Seithi focuses primarily on local and international news, information and current affairs. Catch the online news portal at http://seithi.mediacorp.sg/.

programme.title: Kannae Kaniamuthe S3
programme.desc: A comedic client tests the patience of Mike and Sara. On the other hand, Shamini gets upset when she realizes that her relationship is to be kept lowkey. An emotional family discussion ensues about coming clean with Kayal, while Charu has her suspicions about Nila and her intentions. Are the decisions being made, the right ones?

programme.title: Binge Café with Anu Hasan Season 5
programme.desc: In this engaging interview, actor Atharvaa and director Nelson Venkatesan open up about their film DNA, sharing behind-the-scenes moments and insights into their creative process. Atharva discusses his trust in the director's vision, while Nelson talks about how he crafts compelling scenes. The duo also shares their admiration for co-star Nimisha and the standout performances of the supporting cast.
